'''''Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Shadow''''' is a compilation of the first three books in the [[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights]] series:

*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Heirs of the Force]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''

These three books, along with the next three in the series, are also compiled in ''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Rise of the Shadow Academy]]''.
